dataProvenance.toleratedTemp: Anweiler et al. 2014 + Ellis et al. 2017 thermal tolerance — equilibrium loss at ≤4°C, CTMax 38.8-39.4°C: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S002209811730045X
dataProvenance.tidePreference: FWC + Florida Museum directional pattern (slack low least active); magnitudes engine-tuned
dataProvenance.lunarSensitivity: Montie et al. 2017 PeerJ — drumming choruses elevated on 2nd + 4th lunar quarters: https://peerj.com/articles/2944/
dataProvenance.weatherSensitivity: Cold-front population impact peer-reviewed (Ellis 2017); fine-grained feeding response unverified — frontalPassageFactor engine-tuned: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S002209811730045X
dataProvenance.timeOfDayPreferences: Florida Museum + FWC: spawning calls 1-2 hr before sunset, dusk-night peak: https://myfwc.com/research/saltwater/fish/spotted-seatrout/mapping/
dataProvenance.structurePreferences: Florida Museum + FishBase (seagrass beds + sandy bottoms → sandFlat): https://www.floridamuseum.ufl.edu/discover-fish/species-profiles/cynoscion-nebulosus/
dataProvenance.weeklyPresenceCurve: Year-round; Mar-Nov spawning season Atlantic + mid-Mar to mid-Sep Gulf: https://myfwc.com/research/saltwater/fish/spotted-seatrout/research-overview-tampa-bay/
dataProvenance.baitAssociations: Lorio & Perret SEAFWA + GovInfo seatrout life history: https://seafwa.org/sites/default/files/journal-articles/LORIO-289.pdf
